units.source_text: 1 2025年，集團就英國滙豐銀⾏有限公司若⼲過去交易活動確認3億美元準備。
units.translation_target_text: 1 In 2025, the group recognized US$300 million in provisions for certain past trading activities of HSBC Bank Limited in the UK.
units.translation_en: 1 In 2025, the group recognized US$300 million in provisions for certain past trading activities of HSBC Bank Limited in the UK.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 1 In 2025, the group recognized US$300 million in provisions for certain past trading activities of HSBC Bank Limited in the UK.

units.source_text: 2 2025年，集團因應Herald Fund SPC在盧森堡地⽅法院就Bernard L. Madoff Investment Securities LLC詐騙案提出索償確認11億美元準備。
units.translation_target_text: 2 In 2025, the Group confirmed US$1.1 billion in reserves in response to Herald Fund SPC’s claim in the Luxembourg District Court regarding the Bernard L. Madoff Investment Securities LLC fraud case.
units.translation_en: 2 In 2025, the Group confirmed US$1.1 billion in reserves in response to Herald Fund SPC’s claim in the Luxembourg District Court regarding the Bernard L. Madoff Investment Securities LLC fraud case.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 2 In 2025, the Group confirmed US$1.1 billion in reserves in response to Herald Fund SPC’s claim in the Luxembourg District Court regarding the Bernard L. Madoff Investment Securities LLC fraud case.

units.source_text: 3 列賬基準營業⽀出之貨幣換算（不計及須予注意項⽬之貨幣換算）。
units.translation_target_text: 3. Currency conversion of operating expenses based on presentation (excluding currency conversion of items requiring attention).
units.translation_en: 3. Currency conversion of operating expenses based on presentation (excluding currency conversion of items requiring attention).

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 3. Currency conversion of operating expenses based on presentation (excluding currency conversion of items requiring attention).

units.source_text: 4 按固定匯率基準，相當於屬慣常業務成本，並未分類為與出售阿根廷業務及加拿⼤銀⾏業務相關的須予注意項⽬。這並不包括與此等交易相關的出售成本。
units.translation_target_text: 4 On a constant exchange rate basis, they amount to customary business costs and are not classified as noteworthy items related to the sale of the Argentina business and the Canadian banking business. This does not include selling costs associated with such transactions.
units.translation_en: 4 On a constant exchange rate basis, they amount to customary business costs and are not classified as noteworthy items related to the sale of the Argentina business and the Canadian banking business. This does not include selling costs associated with such transactions.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 4 On a constant exchange rate basis, they amount to customary business costs and are not classified as noteworthy items related to the sale of the Argentina business and the Canadian banking business. This does not include selling costs associated with such transactions.
